brainstorm/linear-integration.summary:
Recap:
Current understanding: Teams already using Linear need Plan-shaped work to land where their collaboration, assignment, status, and execution conversations already happen, instead of forcing work through local files or GitHub issues. / Collaborators can review, assign, discuss, and execute Plan-created work in Linear, while agents can consume Linear Project and Issue data through the connected Linear MCP. The value is less translation between planning and team execution.
Key decisions: appetite captured.
Unresolved risks or questions: there are still open questions to review.
Parked items: none.
Recommended next stage: Review recap and continue into the epic stage when ready.
brainstorm/linear-integration.next_action: Review recap and continue into the epic stage when ready.
